reviews.review_title: The gunpoint angle is the problem
reviews.review_description:
I'm using a Quest 3, and the gunpoint angle is terrible.
Please add an option to adjust it.
It's also weird to hold it by the trigger. Please make it possible to change the grip.
Not much content but it's fun and polished. Good voiceover (mostly just during tutorials). Casual and simple.

The gameplay premise from the few minute or so I played it seems possibly decent, though the extremely foggy/ fuzzy (very low resolution?) and overtly dark neon drenched style makes it slightly difficult to focus. So I'm not a fan of the look or clarity so far.
But the main massive issue for me as someone with nearly zero room to (safely) stretch my arms out and keep taking multiple steps (especially when circling around as needed in this game) is the ridiculous lack of ANY locomotion or smooth turning.
The space is way to big to stay 100% stationaryy, so you have to move a great deal in every direction, as well as reaching out your arms (obviously). This makes it IMPOSSIBLE to play without CONSTANTLY looking, re-adjusting, and worrying about hitting furniture and knocking over/ breaking items around you. 
The snap turning is also frustrating in this situation, putting me WAY too far from one direction if I adjust the other sides distance from the bar or drink fountains. So again the game becomes unplayable in my situation because something as simple as basic virtual locomotion and smooth turning/ rotation wasn't implemented...
I may give it another 15 minutes or so, but I don't see this game being one I am able to keep from getting a refund on.

I can't at all recommend it in it's current state unless you have a large empty play space.

reviews.review_title: No updates since 2 years & quest 3 graph
reviews.review_description:
Quest 3 resolution upgrade and texture improvements are missing. At least expect resolution upgrade for quest 3.

No updates to the app in 2 years.

reviews.review_title: Can we please fix the gun position?
reviews.review_description: When I hold the gun with a straight wrist it aims toward the floor. Have anyone ever tested this game on a Quest or it is just a copy paste from PC, designed for a different controller?

Coffin Rot Brewing Co is a fun bartending game serving drinks to ghosts while shooting skeletons who try to steal your gold. I found it to be a polished title despite being somewhat limited in gameplay and options. Its all about going fast serving drinks and if you have time washing them to get extra combo points. Check out my video for my full thoughts where I give the game an 8 out of 10.

Video - https://youtu.be/HTEiPg3Q_e8

reviews.review_title: Fun and simple game with loads of charm
reviews.review_description: The game is simple, but really fun and easy to pick up and understand! I very much appreciate the charming style the game has, the guns are all really satisfying and there are a ton of fun little details that make it feel like there was a lot of care put into it.

You can see it included as in my Top 10 App Lab games video series here: https://youtu.be/0YXaguvpL9Y  

Make money by serving drinks to an undead pirate crew whilst warding off skeletons who want to plunder your hard earned stash. A challenging arcade shooter with plenty of unlockables to keep things fresh.
